string.text: Hello, Caretaker~ Huh? Based on your reaction you forgot my new name? It's CHEETA! Yes, Cheeta, like the cheetah who can take down honey badgers! Gao! Oh, wait... the sound should be "chip-chirp", right?
Cheeta, last videocall you seemed to fall asleep...

Uweh... video meetings with the Leader and the others are exhausting... Next time, I'll just put a dummy in front of the screen! And I'll program it to respond with "Oh, yes, yes, yes" no matter what it's asked!
More work...? Is it for the Caretaker? Well, I guess there's no choice. Let the greatest genius of this century lend you a hand!
Okay Cheeta, that's enough. Please head back to base.
